impacts.statement: Water reaches the level of instrument shelf inside gage house.
Water reaches the river Gage house floor.
Water affects a convenience store and gas station on the downstream side of State Highway 16 about one quarter mile southeast of the river.
Some dirt roads near the river are flooded.
Water is partially covering several county roads and dirt roads near the river.
Minor over bank flooding continues in areas south of the river.
Minor overbank flooding is occurring south of the river.

hydronotes.statement: River forecasts for this location take into account past precipitation and the precipitation amounts expected approximately 24 hours into the future from the forecast issuance time.
